events.event_description: First U.S. mission to Denmark established when Henry Wheaton presented credentials as Chargé d'Affaires.

evidence.quote: Henry Wheaton, Chargé d'Affaires. Appointed: 1827-03-03. Credentials presented: 1827-09-20. Presented recall on or shortly before 1835-05-29.

events.event_description: Legation Copenhagen closed, ending U.S. diplomatic representation in Denmark.

evidence.quote: Robert Borden Reams, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Legation Copenhagen closed on 1941-12-20.

events.event_description: Legation Copenhagen reopened after WWII closure, with Monnett Bain Davis in charge pending presentation of credentials.

evidence.quote: Note: The mission at Copenhagen was reopened as a Legation on June 16, 1945, with Davis in charge pending presentation of his letter of credence.

events.event_description: U.S. mission elevated from Legation to Embassy when Josiah Marvel was promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary and presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Josiah Marvel, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1946-03-13. Credentials presented: 1946-04-23. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1947-03-18.
